narrative:
Springboro City 4-B (precinct in Warren County) has 1,114 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.5 percentage points.
